output.answer: The salary of the US Secretary of State is not available in Wikidata based on the provided queries. No results were found for the entity Q525086 (United States Secretary of State) using the salary property (P1404).
output.formatted:
The salary of the US Secretary of State is not available in Wikidata based on the provided queries. No results were found for the entity Q525086 (United States Secretary of State) using the salary property (P1404).

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?salary WHERE {
  wd:Q525086 wdt:P1404 ?salary
}
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 1 columns
